A '''Pappfak''' was the name of an [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]] known for possessing long, blue-[[Color/Legends|colored]] tentacles. Pappfaks could regularly be found inhabiting the marketplaces at [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

They may have had three [[Gender/Legends|sexes]]: at the wedding of [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Valarian/Legends|Valarian]], musician [[Doikk Na'ts/Legends|Doikk Na'ts]] of the [[Figrin D'an and the Modal Nodes/Legends|Modal Nodes]] observed three of them in what he described as a "prenuptial embrace."

{{Species-stub}}
